title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Support > Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Tap on the Support option from the Home screen or menu.
On the Support screen, tap on the Device option to open the Device screen.
expected: An analytics event is logged when the user opens the Support > Device screen. The event should track usage analytics including event count by country, gender, app version, app build, and app environment.
